title: Phantom Equity Plan
description: Sets up cash bonus tracking units that mimic stock price performance, offering upside without issuing actual voting shares.
whatsCovered: Phantom stock unit awards and value calculations
Vesting schedules matching standard option schedules
Exclusion of voting or shareholder governance rights
Tax treatment of cash distributions (W2 income)
whenToUse: Use this phantom stock agreement to incentivize key employees without diluting capital or granting voting power in your startup or LLC.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

clauses.heading: PHANTOM EQUITY PLAN
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for Phantom Equity Plan. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Phantom Option Grant
clauses.body: Company grants Employee {phantom_units} phantom stock units, which shall vest over a period of {vesting_years} years, tracking standard share price appreciation.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is phantom stock?
faq.answer: It is a contractual agreement that gives the employee the right to receive cash equal to the value of a specific number of shares, without owning stock.

faq.question: Is phantom stock taxed on grant?
faq.answer: No. Unlike options or restricted stock, phantom units are only taxed as ordinary income when the cash payment is actually distributed.
